Package us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.items

Class ItemBuilder

java.lang.Object
us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.items.BaseItemBuilder<ItemBuilder>
us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.items.ItemBuilder
public class ItemBuilder extends BaseItemBuilder<ItemBuilder>
The parent itembuilder that extends BaseItemBuilder.

    static ItemBuilder
    setMaterial(org.bukkit.Material material)
    Alternative method to create a ItemBuilder Specifically modified for configurations, so it incorporates all sub builders like FireworkBuilder.

    The main method to create ItemBuilder Specifically modified for configurations, so it incorporates all sub builders like FireworkBuilder.

    • ItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack)

  • Method Details

    • setStack

      public static ItemBuilder setStack(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack)
      The main method to create ItemBuilder Specifically modified for configurations, so it incorporates all sub builders like FireworkBuilder.
      Parameters:
      itemStack - The ItemStack that you wish to edit
      Returns:
      A new ItemBuilder

    • setMaterial

      public static ItemBuilder setMaterial(org.bukkit.Material material)
      Alternative method to create a ItemBuilder Specifically modified for configurations, so it incorporates all sub builders like FireworkBuilder.
      Parameters:
      material - The Material that you want to create an item from
      Returns:
      A new ItemBuilder
